rooms.name: The Fountain
rooms.description: You wake up at a murky fountain, covered in sticky mutant mud. The water glows faintly with an eerie green Ooze color. Your head throbs - you have no memory of how you got here. Something glints in the mud near your hand.

rooms.name: Fountain Plaza
rooms.description: You stand in a dusty plaza dominated by a large stone fountain at its center. The water glows with a faint green Ooze color - the result of the Great Mutagen Spill. Mutant weeds push through cracked cobblestones. The Canal District lies to the east. A path leads north toward the Crossroads.

rooms.name: Fountain Plaza

skills.name: Nature's Blessing
skills.description: Heals 5% of max HP using druidic magic

skills.name: Concentrate
skills.description: Focus your mind to increase accuracy. +WIS to hit for 4 rounds.

skills.name: Haymaker
skills.description: A powerful but reckless strike. +STR damage, -DEX to hit.

skills.name: Back-off
skills.description: Use agility to dodge all attacks this round. Costs stamina.

skills.name: Scream
skills.description: Release a berserker cry. -WIS/INT, +DEX/STR for 2 rounds.

skills.name: Slap
skills.description: A quick stunning strike. DEX vs CON to stun for 1 round.
